title: Improved Quality Of Life
description: Simple mods to improve quality of life for vanilla friendly server.
body:
**Light modpack ideal for vanilla-friendly servers.**

This modpack adds mods that improve gameplay in a vanilla friendly way. It allows for easier farming, exploration, and mining. It also adds player and mob heads to allow you to display them throughout your base. This is perfect for a lightly moded server or your next SMP.

**Mods include:**
- Player and Mob Heads to display throughout your world
- Right Click Harvest so you can easily harvest items without replanting seeds
- Traveller Backpacks's which allows you to equip a backpack and take it with you on your travels!
- Explorer's & Nature Compass to find nearby structures, towns, and biomes
- RME's Campfire Leather to be able to turn rotten flesh into leather
- Universal Bone Meal to allow you to bone meal all plants in the game
- Veinminer to quickly mine any minecraft blocks you want
- Waystone to allow you to transport easily throughout the world

This modpack includes a small collection of mods to improve quality of life on Minecraft like being able to have backpacks and easily explore to allow players to play Minecraft more easily.
